Comment: Operator-tier verbs: the operator Bearer must never enter browser JS. Both drift guards enforce this manifest: drift_test.go requires every shape here to be fixture-guarded in shapeCtors; drift.test.ts requires that AmpWebClient (the browser client) has no method named per Verb and that no admin Endpoint string appears in client source. A verb with NodeAdminModule=true is the ruled exception: its binding lives ONLY in src/admin.ts (AmpAdminClient — Node-only subpath export, refuses to construct in a browser, never exported from the browser entry), and its endpoint string is confined to that module. Adding or relaxing a binding therefore forces a reviewed edit of this file.
